text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time passes in the blink of an eye until soon
enough, the new year is upon us. While the
students are on winter vacation...

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Here you are, one salt ramen!
choice_data_list: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I track down a ramen shop that's open on the first
of January, and sit down to review our training
regimen over a hot meal.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what have we here? Fu's trainer, kicking off
the new year with a business lunch?
choice_data_list: Yes—it's the start of her classic year, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is raring to take on the Classic Triple
Crown—a series comprising the Satsuki Sho,
Japanese Derby, and Kikuka Sho. It's a
once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for any racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I imagine she'll face stiff competition in all three
races. If we're going to stand a chance of winning,
her hard work alone won't cut it...
choice_data_list: That's why I promised her we'd do this together!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
...!
I see.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
All right, have another egg—on the house. Get in
some extra nutrients before you go see Fu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I leave, the ramen shop owner tips me off to
Ines Fujin's whereabouts, and sure enough, I find
her at the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year! There are two more lines
available on the right, so please—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Trainer?!
choice_data_list: I heard you were working here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, were you hoping to see me in shrine maiden
getup? Aw, too bad! I'm doing crowd control
today!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Just kidding.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So how come you're here? I'm pretty surprised
you came to see me while I'm on the job.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Is there some kind of emergency? Or maybe...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're here to convince me that the time I spend
working is time wasted?
choice_data_list: Yes, and we can't waste a single second!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh... Haha. I guess I should have expected that...
choice_data_list:
So how about we turn your work into a form of
training too?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pulling out my files, I show her the regimen I
made over winter vacation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lately, her peers are getting better and better at
late surges. If she's going to make a successful
getaway, we have to exhaust the competition's
energy reserves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want her to learn how to manipulate
the pace of her opponents. For example, she
should be able to...
choice_data_list: Control the flow of the visitor lines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?
choice_data_list: ...Am I asking for too much?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well... I just don't see how what you were saying
has anything to do with organizing all these
people.
choice_data_list: That's a bummer...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeahhh.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. So you want my work shifts to double up
as training shifts, huh?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. This is just a hunch, based on how
enthusiastic you are about all this, but... I'm
guessing that's not the only idea you've come up
with, is it?
choice_data_list:
I want to test out new ways to boost your
speed!

I'm thinking of working part-time at Shinkyu
Hospital.

I'm thinking of working part-time at Shinkyu
Hospital.

I want you to treat your delivery runs like track
runs!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. This is just a hunch, based on how
enthusiastic you are about all this, but... I'm
guessing that's not the only idea you've come up
with, is it?
choice_data_list:
I want to test out new ways to boost your
speed!

I'm thinking of working part-time at Shinkyu
Hospital.

I'm thinking of working part-time at Shinkyu
Hospital.

I want you to treat your delivery runs like track
runs!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Strength training isn't the only way we can boost
her speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lightening the load on her shoes could work, and
so could performing tooth maintenance that'll
help her keep her teeth clenched during races...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, now I get it. Well, we can test all those out.
choice_data_list: Right!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whew. Tomorrow's going to be one busy day.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You want to get a part-time job too?!
choice_data_list: It would only be at the reception desk...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if I can get to know the doctors at a
treatment facility, I might be able to request
mobile medical services after training and before
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, I've noticed that Ines Fujin has been
straining her back muscles. If I can do anything to
alleviate that burden...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You're such a dummy.
choice_data_list: I'm pretty serious about this!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to be straight with you. If you're
that worried, let's just schedule some proper
hospital visits.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I can adjust my work hours if you let me know the
plan ahead of time, and this'd be way simpler
than you picking up another job.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...You really do put me first, don't you? And
worry a lot while you're at it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! That sounds like a pretty good idea! Let's
start tomorrow morning!
choice_data_list: It does, right?!
It does, right?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Haha. Don't get carried away now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, bend down for a second. Your shoelaces
are untied.
choice_data_list: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Nope, just kidding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A moment later, I feel two gentle pats on my
head.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But you've really thought long and hard about
this! So you get a gold star! Great job!
choice_data_list: Um... What was that?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...A show of gratitude. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you know, all of your ideas are built
around my part-time work.
choice_data_list: That's because I made a vow to you.
That's because I made a vow to you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You did?
choice_data_list: If it matters to you, it matters to me, too.
If it matters to you, it matters to me, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Ines Fujin loves to run. But she loves her family
just as much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If working part-time is how she wants to support
her sisters, then I have no business interfering.
choice_data_list: I like seeing you enjoy running.
I like seeing you enjoy running.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Seeing me enjoy running, huh. Hehe, is that so.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Then maybe I'll take this opportunity to make
some self-centered requests! Like when the
Classic Triple Crown is over, I might just ask to
compete in an even bigger race. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: And I mean without quitting any of my jobs. I don't want to lose a single thing, you know?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Will you still like me if I start saying crazy things
like that?
choice_data_list: Yes, I'll do everything I can to support you!
Yes, I'll do everything I can to support you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sappy line acquired! Ahaha, I was hoping you'd
say that. Another win for me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right. Then here's to another great year,
Trainer!
